since_last: 56% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.09% · BTC +0.25% · Gold +1.10% · Nasdaq100 +0.55%. 56% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.94%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.94%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +8.16%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +8.16%, ASML +6.84%, VRT +6.67%, ARM +6.55%, SMR +6.42%. Laggards: SNAP -4.55%, SPCX -3.70%, APP -3.51%, META -3.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.70% at $194.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
